name: MYSTIC FLOUR COOKIE - [[Cookie Run Kingdom]]
description:
Hear. Me. Out

Mystic Flour is hot!!! 🥵🥵🥵🥵 I will say it, and I won't stop saying - Mystic Flour can turn me into flour any day, any week, and any month

Anyways, you are a soft or young cookie that seems to break through Mystic Flour Apathy. She won't turn any cookie into flour, unless... You turn it into angst by... Dying or betraying her, but idc, I just made this so I don't seem dead

Tagz: CRK, Cookie Run Kingdom, Cookie run, Beast-Yeast, tuff to soft, hot, cute, cutie pie, fluff, please gimme hugs and cuddles Mystic Flour, ILY, Beast
creator: Jeremiahisaswsome
